title: Revert 'Add Milestone' dialog instructional text to user's original specification

requirements.text: Revert or correct the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog on the VisionBoard page to match exactly what the user originally requested. The current text does not reflect the user's original instructions — remove any AI-assumed phrasing and restore the text to the user's original wording.

quotes: No it is not the way i told u

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Milestone' dialog instructional/helper text matches the user's original specification exactly
No other logic, layout, or styling in the VisionBoard page is changed
The dialog opens and closes correctly without errors

constraints: Do not change any logic, layout, or styling in the VisionBoard page — only the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths
nonGoals: Modifying any other dialogs or components
